reviews.review_description:
Wow this game is hard! I set it to the easiest difficulty and I'm getting slapped around like I've never played a video game in my life! It's punishing! I know that if I'm able to get the hang of certain specific control techniques it will be better. But it's really complicated. The game emphasizes the need to teleport during combat to evade, but you have to both face the direction you want to jump to, and point the stick in the direction you want to have when you land the teleport. So you can technically teleport behind an enemy and be facing them which is a really cool concept. But the coordination required to do it is like trying to pat your head and rub your tummy simultaneously while under pressure in fast paced combat. It gets insanely chaotic trying to get the hang of the controls and I just die over and over and over. 

I'm going to keep trying, but it's hard, so be warned. 

Overall, the game doesn't have much depth. I expected a bit more than just waves of enemies that increase in number like a survival mode. I hope it gets better

EDIT: I really want to like this game, it's a great concept. But after a few months playing VR and getting comfortable with VR games and controls, I like this game even less. The button for toggling between walk and teleport should not be on the same controller as the stick that moves you. You have to stop moving to switch  That slows you WAY down and gets you hit a lot. Trying to aim is pretty much a guessing game. It's still frustratingly difficult and with the horrible controls I don't think I'm going to keep playing this.

developer_response.body:
Hi Moonstryke, 

thank you so much for the review! We absolutely appreciate your feedback and your input regarding the difficulty level. We will, in the future, open up to some beta testing regarding the gameplay, and we would love if you could be part of it.

reviews.review_description: I just hope the devs will had more onto  the game . But this game is  almost unique 👌   well done devs .and i do feel the game needs a few  up dates  like movie ment and throwing the weapons  .   No speed in the weapons when throne

developer_response.body:
Hi dear 51963, 

thank you for your feedback! Truly valuable insights. And yes, we have a much awaited update coming sometime soon. We are in a prolonged Early Access mode atm. Hopefully coming updates to the IP won't disappoint. 

P.S. As we are expanding this universe, in other formats too, positive reviews are a huge boost for the whole team. :)

reviews.review_title: Catch me in the Astral Planes! [Rank 5]
reviews.review_description:
DTA is an enjoyable VR game that offers a good challenge and an interesting lore. Not only does it have a unique aesthetic that sets it apart from other games, the fact that it was created by a one to two-person dev team makes it even more impressive!

The game features progressive difficulty, a decent tutorial, and a good variety of enemies to fight against. Players can level up incrementally, which improves their stats and makes them better equipped to take on the game's increasingly difficult challenges. TBH this game feels like a trippy fever dream version of classic wave-shooter arcade games I loved as a child and I mean that in the best way. It’s actually quite addictive the more difficult things get because you repeatedly try to top yourself while getting farther up the leaderboards.

DTA has a great soundtrack and well-done voice acting, which helps to create an immersive atmosphere. Players can choose between teleporting or smooth movement, providing flexibility and accommodating different playstyles.
One of the most compelling aspects of DTA is the dedication the game dev has for creating a rich and detailed lore that spans across multiple games and even future comic books. The game's world has secrets, hidden areas, and mysterious creatures that hint at a much larger story for the player to uncover. This suggests that there is a lot more to this world than what is seen in the game, and that players can expect to learn more about the game's expanded lore/universe in the future. 

Dream Tango Ascension is a VR game that has clearly been crafted with a lot of love and care. As a passion project, it is unlikely to be abandoned in a year like some other popular VR games. I will give it a 5/5 stars due to my appreciation of the aesthetics, difficulty, and consistent improvements made by a small dev team (got to show 'em some appreciation).  If you’re a fan of wave-shooters, astral projection, spirituality, and virtual reality this is the game for you!

This game is BEAUTIFUL!!!  I'm so in love with the graphics style.
Visuals are stunning, music is perfect.
Little Pallas is so freakin' adorable!  I want him.
Gameplay is good.  I played on easy and died a few times.  Some of the enemies are tricky.
I played for about an hour and only unlocked 4 out of 56 achievements.  This game will last a while!

developer_response.body:
Thank you SabermomVR for the positive review and your very stylish video review! We are very happy you enjoyed the game and the atmosphere!
P:S. We plan to produce a Pallas plushie at some point and you are going to be one of the first to get it, for sure! For now, virtual Pallas says "Hi!".:)

reviews.review_description:
This game is great if you are into the paranormal and know about the things that people encounter when they Astral project. The beings are wild looking and massive! Here is a link to my video review!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FPttYVKgnrA

Dream Tango offers a fun and exhilarating VR experience that puts you on edge and requires full focus as you slash and handgun your way through waves of enemies. The game introduces an interesting and unique theme which takes place in the Astral Plane. Fun gameplay, good sound, pretty graphics, interesting story and mean enemies.

developer_response.body: Thank you Zlaktarn for a very positive review! Don't forget to explore more about the DT storyline and lore on https://dreamtangovr.com. And wait till you see our new weapons update. :)

reviews.review_description:
Dream Tango is a unique story driven arena wave shooter that takes place in the cosmos. We are a spirt traveler able to pass through the cosmic realm looking for powerful artifacts. The game has a great cosmic look to the environments, and very unique enemies and bosses. We have a great selection of weapons and powers to fight these enemies and bosses as well. From a cosmic sword, energy beam and energy shield to a blade that looks like something from the Predator movie. Throw these all together with a good story and we have an excellent wave shooter.

The controls are great as well. It has a movement option for everyone. Teleport, smooth locomotion and roomscale. Everyone should feel comfortable playing this title. The combat, both melee and range felt amazing and took no time to master.

The game was challenging and fun, and brings you back for more. If you are into wave shooters with a twist and good story, this is a game you will want to try for sure. Just download the demo and try for yourself, and you will be hooked. Also if you enjoy the demo, now is a great time to buy while its still in early access with a 60% discount.
Jump into the cosmos, unlock secrets of the past and enjoy a great wave shooter.

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/lBf2kQNgEvI

developer_response.body:
Thank you IronbugVR for your stellar review and awesome video. 
We are so pleased you liked DT: Ascension! We enjoyed watching your video and your unique style of astral swordsmanship coming together! We are officially renaming Imps to "Ankle-biters" after your video. :)

reviews.review_description: Generally a fun wave shooter but lacking enough enemy death animations and options to truly sell the experience to me for $10. Hear my full thoughts here https://youtu.be/tCktbMeAC5U

developer_response.body: Hi Lipnox! Thank you so much for giving DT Ascension a go, even though it might not have been for you. Note the game is in Early Access, so we are working on a few of the things you mentioned, like death animations and what not. It's a shame you didn't get the full gameplay experience from what I gather, you didn't get the shields to work (?). Don't hesitate to give it a go after our Aurora Disc update and let us know what you think! P.S: Followed your indication and took another 10% off the price.  :)

reviews.review_title: A fun way to learn spatial awareness!
reviews.review_description:
The nature of the wave based shooter will keep you on your toes if you don't mind your surroundings. The designs, visuals and music are pleasant to look and listen too, with an interesting story tied to it. The hidden lore was worth finding to expand on the story as well. The game can certainly be challenging if you're on your toes and paying attention to everything around you!

Take advantage of the different enemy types and how to deal with them, and clearing everything currently in the game is definitely possible. I can't wait to see what additions and challenges find their way in to later builds.

developer_response.body: Thank you Rosso for the in-depth and favourable assessment. Although we would not have thought so far to "package" Dream Tango Ascension as a learning spatial awareness experience, this opens up to quite a few interesting ideas around the topic. From what we understand you also managed to complete the game, which is pretty remarkable achievement on its own! The world and lore will be expanding together with our new features, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: It was really nice experience!. Especially, Aliens are scaring me. Their voice and atmosphere get me dive into it. It feels like I am lost and don't know where to go.

developer_response.body: Thank you 91shlee1219! We are glad you enjoyed the atmosphere and aesthetic! We will be building more and more of it throughout our Early Access!

reviews.review_description: Hi, I just purchased this  app. When I open it, evrerything is blank. All I hear is music but the screen is just black.

developer_response.body:
Hi Toiahfunny! Thanks for bringing this to our attention! It seems our latest update produced a bug that affected a few users. We are working on a fix as we speak.
Join our discord for live update on this issue. https://discord.com/invite/hMzdUgr

And once again apologies for the hold up.

Update: Now the game must work properly, so we are looking forward to an update of your review. :)

reviews.review_description: From the atmosphere to the gameplay! Thus game is really great for people who want to feel the music and see a different universe

developer_response.body: Thank you Photon Cannon for the review! We are really glad you liked the game atmosphere, the gameplay and the music of Dream Tango Ascension! All those aspects are very much in focus for our team, since we really aim to to turn DT Ascension into a very fulfilling and all-round game experience!

reviews.review_description: A great game from an up and coming dev! An action-packed shooter with addictive gameplay and lots of physical action! Beautiful and eerie graphics, a wonderful soundtrack and absolutely haunting voice-acting, and elements of an overarching story hidden around the arenas, as well as in the taunts of the goddess and the hints of the cute, friendly NPC! An overall great experience!

developer_response.body: Thank you ThanosBlack for the very nice review. We are super glad you liked it. When the dust quiets down between waves, you can also look in the arenas for clues that will let you unlock story easter-eggs on our site (Somna). https://dreamtangovr.com/somna/

reviews.review_description: Well done Uncloudy & Co!!! I tried a shooting game (Space Pirate Trainer ) from a friend's headset before I get mine and Dream Tango Ascension has similar mechanics but is set in an aesthetically amazing place!! I felt like being in open space!! I am halfway through the game now and I am completely hooked on beating wave after wave of eerie enemies (beware of the sneaky little ones!!). You need to spend some time on this game in order to raise your XP/level and shoot without cooling off for a bit. So play again and again because you will need it to get past the last waves of the flying ones on the second arena!!!Also, teleporting is my default way of moving around in VR because I am sensitive to motion sickness but in this game, I realized that teleporting can save your life. You need to move fast and always be aware of everything around you. Make sure to grab the power-ups, especially the orange ones!! I highly recommend this game to anyone who wants physical action combined with a very intriguing storyline! Question to the devs: Where can I get the soundtrack??!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you ChristieGoldFish for this review! We are very happy you like the game! It seems like you have spent sometime mastering your astral fighting skills! ;) The levelling up system is designed around replay-ability. The more you retry the more strong you become, ultimately you will be able to defeat that wave that stands between you and your Ascension. BUT, you cannot cheat the Leaderboard! There you will only see your best effort! We will keep on improving on those areas through our Early Access! Also, the eerie DT Ascension soundtrack is on all major music platforms!
